content.query:
drop table opt.heii_t;
create table opt.heii_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
select 
    token, 
    gender,
    cast(AgeInYears as float) as AgeInYears,
    [IndIsDeceasedFlag],
    [IndIsMarriedFlag],
    case when ProbabilityWhite >= greatest(ProbabilityAsian, ProbabilityBlack, ProbabilityHispanic, ProbabilityOther) then 'White'
    when ProbabilityBlack >= greatest(ProbabilityAsian, ProbabilityHispanic, ProbabilityOther, ProbabilityWhite) then 'Black'
    when ProbabilityHispanic >= greatest(ProbabilityAsian, ProbabilityBlack, ProbabilityOther, ProbabilityWhite) then 'Hispanic'
    when ProbabilityAsian >= greatest(ProbabilityBlack, ProbabilityHispanic, ProbabilityOther, ProbabilityWhite) then 'Asian'
    when ProbabilityOther >= greatest(ProbabilityAsian, ProbabilityBlack, ProbabilityHispanic, ProbabilityWhite) then 'Other'
    else 'Unknown' end as race,
    zip,
    case when z2.zip3 is null then '000' else coalesce(z1.zip3_to, substring(a.zip, 1, 3)) end as zip3,
    a.state, 
    CountyName,
    FIPSStateCounty,
    city,
    CensusTractBlockGroup,
    case when CountyName is null then concat(a.state, '-XXXXX') else concat(a.state, '-', CountyName) end as StateCounty,
    case when city is null then
    case when CountyName is null then concat(a.state, '-XXXXX-XXXXX') else concat(a.state, '-', CountyName, '-XXXXX') end 
    else
    case when CountyName is null then concat(a.state, '-XXXXX-', city) else concat(a.state, '-', CountyName, '-' , city) end
    end as StateCountyCity
from 
    customer.stg_heii_t a
    left join dim.zip3_pop_lt_20k_t z1
        on substring(a.zip, 1, 3) = z1.zip3_from
    left join (select distinct zip3 from dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t) z2
        on coalesce(z1.zip3_to, substring(a.zip, 1, 3)) = z2.zip3
where 
    (a.gender is not null or a.state is not null or a.AgeInYears is not null or a.IndIsMarriedFlag is not null or a.IndIsDeceasedFlag is not null or a.zip is not null or 
    a.CountyName is not null or a.FIPSStateCounty is not null or a.ProbabilityWhite is not null or a.CurrAddrDistance is not null or a.LA1and10 is not null)
;

select count(*), count(distinct token) from opt.heii_t;
--14291646

select distinct IndIsDeceasedFlag
from 
  customer.stg_heii_t a where IndIsDeceasedFlag = ''
order by 1
